sections.sectionTitle: Ruth in Boaz' Lo-ah Ansang Tawm

verses.text: Tu-in Naomi in a pasal' tanaute, Elimelek innkuansung mi, Boaz min nei a hau migina khat nei hi

Tua ciangin Moab mi Ruth in Naomi kiangah, “Lo-ah hong kuansak in la, maipha ka muhna peuhpeuhpa' nungah anvuite lakah a sang hong tawmsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai in, ka tanu aw,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah kuankhia-in pai a, anlate' nung lo sungah ansangte a tawm hi. Elimelek-te innkuan Boaz' lo-ah va kuankha hi
Boaz zong Bethlehem panin hong kuanin amah in anlate kiangah, “ Topa in note hong ompih ta hen!” a ci hi. Amaute in dawngin, “ Topa in nang thupha hong pia ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Boaz in anlate a uk a nasempa kiangah, “Hih ka muh ngeiloh numei kua' ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin anlate a uk nasempa in dawngin, “Moab gam panin Naomi tawh a hong ciahkik Moab numei ahi hi

Tua numei in, ‘Kong thum hi; ansang hong tawmsakin anlate' nungah anlomte lakah a kiate hong khawmsak in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah hong pai-in tawlkhat zong khawlloin zingsang tunga kipan tudong semsuak hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Boaz in Ruth kiangah, “Tu-in ngai in ka ta aw; midangte' lo-ah ansang tawm dingin pai kei in la, hih lo zong nusia kei in. Hih lai-ah kuamah in bangmah hong cihlo ding ahih manin ka nasem numeite' nai-ah om cinten in
Amaute' anlakna lo mitsuan in la, amaute' nungah zui in. Nang hong bawlsiat lohna ding uh tangvalte thu ka pia khin hi. Na dang a tak ciangin pai in la tangvalte' tui tawisa dawn in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah a mai-in lei-ah puk a, leilakah kunin ama kiangah, “Kei gamdang mi khat hinapi, hih banga kei nong phawkna dingin bang hangin na mai-ah maipha ngah thei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Boaz in tuanu dawngin, “Na pasal a sih khita kipan na teeknu-a' dingin na sepnate khempeuh, leh na nu leh na pa leh na pian'na gam nusia-in cikmahin na theih ngeiloh mite kiangah na paina thu a kicing takin kei kiangah hong kigenzo hi
Topa in na gamtatnasate a pha tawh hong thuk a, a liimnuai beel dinga na paina Israel-te' Pasian, Topa in thaman a cingin hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Ruth in, “Ka topa aw, kei tungah nong dik mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen na nasem numeite hilo napi-in na nasemnu' tungah migitna kam nong pau hi,” a ci hi

Annek hun ciangin Boaz in tuanu kiangah, “Hih lai-ah hong pai in; anlum ne in la, leenggahzu sungah na an diah in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin anlate gei-ah amah tu a, tuapa in ankante tuanu a pia hi. Amah in a kham mateng ne a, a khamval zong pawlkhat omlai hi
Tuanu ansang tawm dingin a din' ciangin Boaz in a tangvalte hilh a, “Anlomte lak nangawnah tawmsak un la, amah ko sia kei un
Anlom hente lak panin zong ama-a' dingin pawlkhat dokkhia-in ama top dingin nusia un la, amah tai kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in nitak dong lo sungah ansang tawm hi. A topsa teng satkhia a, mangbuhham seu khat bang pha hi
Tua ciangin amah in tuate pua-in khuapi sungah a ciah hi. A an top teng a teeknu lakin, a ankhamvalte zong la-in a pia hi

Tua ciangin a teeknu in ama kiangah, “Tuni-in koi-ah tawm na hi hiam? Koi-ah sem na hi hiam? Nang hong phawk mipa in thupha ngah ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a teeknu kiangah a naseppihte gen a, “Tuni-a ka sepna mipa pen Boaz ahi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Naomi in a monu kiangah, “A dikna in a site hita leh a hingte hita leh a mangngilhlo Topa in amah thupha pia ta hen,” a ci hi. Naomi in ama kiangah, “Tua mipa pen i behte, i tanau naipen khat ahi hi,” zong ci lai hi
Tua ciangin Moab numei Ruth in, “Tu-a banah amah in kei kiangah, ‘Ka an khempeuh a lak khit matengun ka nasemte' kiang nai-ah om in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Naomi in a monu Ruth kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, ama numeite tawh na kuankhop theih hoih mahmah hi; tua hi kei leh lo dangah nang hong kibawlsia khading hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Boaz' numeite' nai-ah amah omin mangbuhham lak khit dong ansang tawm a, a teeknu tawh a omkhawm hi.
